title: Lab 2 — USV PID Tuning
text:
Data Analysis
After the field session, process the logs locally:

Convert .BIN → .mat using utils/ardu_utils/bin2mat.py.
Inspect timeseries with book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/proc_closedloop_response.m.
Compute step metrics with book/w07_lab_usv_pid/code/closedloop_stepinfo.m — rise time, settling time, overshoot, steady-state error.
